title: Contact
summary: Engage-hero (single line: 'I'm not selling services. I respond to interesting work.') + receipts row (email + GitHub + LinkedIn as mono row) + minimal form (name + email + message + Turnstile + Resend).

strategy.decision: Single form + receipts row + one-line copy that explicitly disclaims the sales-funnel framing.
strategy.why: ADR-0001 positioning + R1 categorical refusal both ban transactional framing. The 'I'm not selling services' line directly closes the inference 'this is a contact form, therefore I'm selling something.' Receipts row gives reviewers the channels they actually use (email / GitHub / LinkedIn) instead of forcing the form.
strategy.shipped: v2 /contact — form-only, generic 'Get in touch' framing that reads as service-funnel.
strategy.gap: Proposed = explicit disclaim of sales-funnel + receipts row + minimal form; Shipped = generic form with sales-funnel framing.
strategy.question: Does the disclaim ('I'm not selling services') read as confident or as performative? Voice-guide check before ship.

currentState.annotation: Reframe copy explicitly (R1 enforcement); add receipts row above form.
